# Shifa Asia

> Shifa Asia is a natural wellness e-commerce store shipping premium wellness products to UAE, Pakistan, and worldwide.

## About

Shifa Asia offers a carefully curated range of natural wellness essentials — each product is personally selected, stocked, and shipped directly by the Shifa Asia team. We are a small, customer-first team that replies personally to every enquiry.

## What We Sell

- Natural wellness products and supplements
- Products for personal health and wellbeing
- All products ship with tracked delivery

## Who We Serve

- Customers in UAE and Pakistan (primary markets)
- International customers worldwide
- Customers who prefer local payment methods: JazzCash, Easypaisa, card

## Payments Accepted

Card, JazzCash, Easypaisa — all processed securely via Paykassma (PCI-DSS certified).

## Shipping

Tracked shipping across UAE, Pakistan & worldwide. Every order is packed and shipped directly by Shifa Asia.

## Trust & Quality

- Every product is personally selected and quality-checked
- Certificates of Analysis (NovaCert) available on product pages
- Secure checkout — we never store card or wallet details
- No advertising or tracking cookies used

## Contact

Email: hello@shifa.com
Phone: +971 XX XXX XXXX
